title: indigofera trita var. flaccida
intro: Indigofera trita var. flaccida, also known as the creeping indigo or small leaf indigo, is a variety of the Indigofera trita plant, a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Indigofera trita var. flaccida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
